Back to Portfolio Academic Work

Marketing Plan for Launching a Tech Product in the Saudi Market

April 10, 2026 Strategic Planner Google Analytics, Figma, SEMrush, Hotjar

The Challenge / Objective

The fictional SaaS product 'Alpha' faced a high churn rate of 15% after the first month of subscription. The challenge is to analyze friction points in the user journey and rebuild the onboarding experience.

This page serves as a template for Training Works, reflecting strategic capabilities, analytical depth, and creative proposals within realistic simulations or academic contexts.

1. Market and Competitor Analysis

Through in-depth research into the mid-market SaaS sector, we uncovered the following:

  • Competitor 1: Relies heavily on content marketing but lacks a seamless in-app user experience.
  • Competitor 2: Offers high customization but is prohibitively expensive for early-stage startups.

2. Audience Segmentation

We segmented the audience into 3 main categories based on core needs:

  1. CTOs: Prioritize security and rapid integration with existing systems.
  2. Marketing Managers: Demand clear and quickly exportable reporting features.
  3. Business Owners: Require a high-level dashboard summarizing ROI.

[!NOTE] This is a callout box that can be used to highlight a crucial metric or insight. The markdown styling for this is automatically supported.

3. Proposed Strategic Plan

To optimize the user journey, we must implement a Product-Led Growth (PLG) methodology:

  • Activation: Guide the user to the “Aha Moment” within 2 minutes of signup.
  • Retention: Deploy smart, customized in-app messages to track user progress.

Execution Phases

Phase Objective Expected Duration
Phase 1 Revamp the Sign-Up UI/UX flow 2 Weeks
Phase 2 Build the Personalization Engine 3 Weeks
Phase 3 Analyze Post-Launch Metrics & A/B Testing Ongoing

4. UI/UX Mockups

In this section, we visualized the newly proposed welcome screen. (Insert UI mockups here to illustrate the visual concept).

Strategic Solutions & Learnings

The onboarding funnel was redesigned to be highly personalized based on the user's industry, alongside the integration of a smart notification system. These enhancements are projected to reduce churn by 7% and boost first-week engagement.

Facing a similar challenge?

Let's connect and achieve similar results together.
